docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILKINSON, EMMET DBA DOORDOCTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAILLET, DEVIN $1,369.64 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,369.64, THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1,369.64 IN 3 INSTALLMENTS AS FOLLOWS: $500 BY FEBRUARY 1, 2026; $500 BY MARCH 1, 2026; $369.00 BY APRIL 1, 2026. IF THE FULL AMOUNT IS NOT PAID BY APRIL 1, 2026, INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM WILL BEGIN ACCRUING UNTIL PAID. THE PARTIES AGREED TO THE AMOUNT, PAYMENT PLAN & INTEREST IF NOT PAID ON TIME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EMMET WILKINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEVIN MAILLET IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2026 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,500.00 FILED BY WILKINSON, EMMET DBA DOORDOCTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MAILLET, DEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MAILLET, DEVIN
